name: WF2 - Smart Product Selection - Rechnungsvorschlaege freigeben

parameters.content:
WF3 - Smart Product Selection

Ziel:
1. approval_id eingeben.
2. Workflow l?dt den Rechnungs-Vorschlag und alle Produkte.
3. Workflow berechnet passende Produktkandidaten.
4. Du w?hlst 1, 2, 3, NEW oder REJECT.
5. Der Workflow ?bernimmt bestehende Produktdaten oder legt ein neues Produkt an.
6. Danach werden Alias, Lagercharge und Pr?fstatus geschrieben.

Wichtig:
- F?r n8n 2.18.5: Abschluss ?ber Form Ending, nicht Respond to Webhook.
- Nach Import Google-Sheets-Credentials neu setzen.
- Erst mit Testdaten ausf?hren.
- WF2 muss approval_id in Rechnungseingang_Pruefung schreiben.

parameters.query:
SELECT
  proposal_key AS approval_id,
  proposal_type,
  status,
  reason,
  to_char(created_at,'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') || 'Z' AS created_at,
  payload->>'source_file' AS source_file,
  payload->>'invoice_number' AS invoice_number,
  payload->>'invoice_date' AS invoice_date,
  payload->>'supplier' AS supplier,
  payload->>'raw_item_name' AS raw_item_name,
  payload->>'recognized_product_name' AS recognized_product_name,
  payload->>'product_key' AS product_key,
  payload->>'mdb_code' AS mdb_code,
  payload->>'quantity' AS quantity,
  payload->>'unit_price_net' AS unit_price_net,
  payload->>'mhd_date' AS mhd_date,
  payload->>'product_slot_id' AS product_slot_id,
  payload->>'machine_id' AS machine_id,
  payload->>'match_type' AS match_type,
  payload->>'match_score' AS match_score,
  payload->>'notes' AS notes,
  payload
FROM automatenlager.product_change_proposals
WHERE status = 'pending'
ORDER BY created_at ASC

SELECT p.product_key AS product_key, p.name AS internal_product_name,
       COALESCE(na.alias,'') AS nayax_product_name,
       COALESCE(sa.mdb_code::text,'') AS mdb_code,
       m.machine_key AS machine_id,
       CASE WHEN sa.active THEN 'TRUE' ELSE 'FALSE' END AS active,
       sa.product_slot_key AS product_slot_id,
       COALESCE(pr.sale_price_gross::text,'') AS sale_price_eur,
       COALESCE(sa.current_machine_qty::text,'') AS current_machine_qty,
       COALESCE(sa.machine_capacity::text,'') AS machine_capacity,
       COALESCE(sa.target_stock::text,'') AS target_stock,
       p.category AS produktart,
       COALESCE(p.vat_rate_pct::text,'') AS mwst_satz,
       COALESCE(sa.notes,'') AS notes
FROM automatenlager.slot_assignments sa
JOIN automatenlager.products p ON p.product_id = sa.product_id
JOIN automatenlager.machines m ON m.machine_id = sa.machine_id
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT pa.alias FROM automatenlager.product_aliases pa WHERE pa.product_id=p.product_id AND pa.source='nayax' AND pa.is_primary=TRUE ORDER BY pa.alias LIMIT 1) na ON TRUE
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT pc.sale_price_gross FROM automatenlager.prices pc WHERE pc.slot_assignment_id=sa.slot_assignment_id AND pc.valid_to IS NULL ORDER BY pc.valid_from DESC LIMIT 1) pr ON TRUE
ORDER BY m.machine_key, sa.mdb_code, sa.active DESC

values.placeholder: Nur bei Auswahl KEY: z.B. SKU_KINDER_BUENO_KLASSIK

options.formDescription: Waehle 1, 2, 3, NEW, KEY oder REJECT. Die Vorschlagsfelder kannst du bei Bedarf ueberschreiben.

value.notes: ={{ [$('Code - Entscheidung auswerten').item.json.notes, 'WF2: Produktstamm ohne Slotzuordnung. Slotdaten werden nur durch WF4 gesetzt.'].filter(Boolean).join(' | ') }}

parameters.query:
UPDATE automatenlager.product_change_proposals
SET status = 'approved',
    decided_at = NOW(),
    decided_by = 'wf2_form'
WHERE proposal_key = '{{ $json.approval_id }}'

UPDATE automatenlager.product_change_proposals
SET status = 'rejected',
    decided_at = NOW(),
    decided_by = 'wf2_form',
    decision_note = '{{ $json.rejection_reason || "Abgelehnt via WF2" }}'
WHERE proposal_key = '{{ $json.approval_id }}'

parameters.completionMessage: Der Vorschlag wurde verarbeitet. Produkt wurde bei Bedarf angelegt, Alias wurde gespeichert, Lagercharge wurde angelegt und die Pruefzeile wurde aktualisiert.
Der Vorschlag wurde abgelehnt und in Rechnungseingang_Pruefung aktualisiert.

parameters.formDescription: Starte die Bearbeitung des n?chsten offenen Rechnungsvorschlags.

parameters.query:
SELECT
  proposal_key AS approval_id,
  proposal_type,
  status,
  reason,
  to_char(created_at,'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') || 'Z' AS created_at,
  payload->>'source_file' AS source_file,
  payload->>'invoice_number' AS invoice_number,
  payload->>'invoice_date' AS invoice_date,
  payload->>'supplier' AS supplier,
  payload->>'raw_item_name' AS raw_item_name,
  payload->>'recognized_product_name' AS recognized_product_name,
  payload->>'product_key' AS product_key,
  payload->>'mdb_code' AS mdb_code,
  payload->>'quantity' AS quantity,
  payload->>'unit_price_net' AS unit_price_net,
  payload->>'mhd_date' AS mhd_date,
  payload->>'product_slot_id' AS product_slot_id,
  payload->>'machine_id' AS machine_id,
  payload->>'match_type' AS match_type,
  payload->>'match_score' AS match_score,
  payload->>'notes' AS notes,
  payload
FROM automatenlager.product_change_proposals
WHERE status = 'pending'
ORDER BY created_at ASC

SELECT pa.alias, pa.source,
       CASE WHEN pa.is_primary THEN 'TRUE' ELSE 'FALSE' END AS is_primary,
       p.product_key, p.name AS product_name
FROM automatenlager.product_aliases pa
JOIN automatenlager.products p ON p.product_id = pa.product_id
ORDER BY pa.source, pa.alias

SELECT p.product_key AS product_key, p.name AS internal_product_name,
       COALESCE(na.alias,'') AS nayax_product_name,
       COALESCE(sa.mdb_code::text,'') AS mdb_code,
       m.machine_key AS machine_id,
       CASE WHEN sa.active THEN 'TRUE' ELSE 'FALSE' END AS active,
       sa.product_slot_key AS product_slot_id,
       COALESCE(pr.sale_price_gross::text,'') AS sale_price_eur,
       COALESCE(sa.current_machine_qty::text,'') AS current_machine_qty,
       COALESCE(sa.machine_capacity::text,'') AS machine_capacity,
       COALESCE(sa.target_stock::text,'') AS target_stock,
       p.category AS produktart,
       COALESCE(p.vat_rate_pct::text,'') AS mwst_satz,
       COALESCE(sa.notes,'') AS notes
FROM automatenlager.slot_assignments sa
JOIN automatenlager.products p ON p.product_id = sa.product_id
JOIN automatenlager.machines m ON m.machine_id = sa.machine_id
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT pa.alias FROM automatenlager.product_aliases pa WHERE pa.product_id=p.product_id AND pa.source='nayax' AND pa.is_primary=TRUE ORDER BY pa.alias LIMIT 1) na ON TRUE
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT pc.sale_price_gross FROM automatenlager.prices pc WHERE pc.slot_assignment_id=sa.slot_assignment_id AND pc.valid_to IS NULL ORDER BY pc.valid_from DESC LIMIT 1) pr ON TRUE
ORDER BY m.machine_key, sa.mdb_code, sa.active DESC
